name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy — SDK install, auth, project bind, plus every feature module (experiments + metrics, gates + configs + kill switches, translations, in-app feedback) in a single plugin. Slash commands are nested under /shipeasy:<noun>:<verb>. Installs fold into three sections: /shipeasy:ops:install (feedback + errors + alerts), /shipeasy:flags:install (gates + configs + kill switches + experiments + events), and /shipeasy:i18n:install (translations). The ops namespace also owns the operational inbox — /shipeasy:ops:list, /shipeasy:ops:report, and /shipeasy:ops:work (one loop over bugs + feature requests + production errors + alerts). Kill switches expose /shipeasy:ks:toggle_switch (named per-key overrides). Deletions are UI-only; the plugin ships no delete commands.
